writeInstallTimestamp.description: Write ISO 8601 timestamp to .rapid-install-meta.json at plugin root

isUpdateStale.description: Return true if install timestamp is older than threshold (default 7 days)

install-meta-subcommand.description: CLI subcommand returning JSON with install timestamp and staleness status

deferred-display.description: Update reminder banner appears AFTER command output, not before

tty-only.description: Reminder banner only shown when stdout is a TTY (not in piped/scripted contexts)

suppressible.description: Setting NO_UPDATE_NOTIFIER env var suppresses the reminder entirely

no-color-respect.description: All new terminal output respects NO_COLOR convention

definition.scope: Implement update staleness detection: timestamp recording during /rapid:install, staleness check in version.cjs, CLI subcommand, and non-blocking reminder banners in status/install skills.

tasks.description: Implement timestamp write/read in version.cjs with .rapid-install-meta.json

tasks.acceptance: Returns true after 7 days, false before

tasks.description: Add CLI install-meta subcommand to rapid-tools.cjs
tasks.acceptance: Subcommand returns JSON with timestamp and staleness boolean

tasks.description: Inject reminder banners into status and install skills
tasks.acceptance: Banner appears after output when stale, hidden when fresh or suppressed

acceptance: All tasks complete with passing tests
